label: Riftshade Sleep Cell
description: Riftshade Sleep Cell is a narrow bedroom partitioned off the Riftshade Hearthroom by a soot-dark bulkhead and an ash-sealed door-frame. A slab-built bunk and underdeck lockers are bolted to the slagcrete wall, their fittings overengineered to withstand constant vibration from conduit runs overhead. Vent grilles feed filtered air from the bastion’s sealed service voids, and the room carries a persistent tang of hot dust and recirculated warmth from the nearby heat-niche. An armored view-slit admits a bruised auroral wash that never fully leaves the corners, even under lumen strips set behind wire guards.
